# Vendored scansci-pdf Wheel

This directory contains the fixed `scansci-pdf` wheel used by `njtech-paper` bootstrap so new users do not need to download the patched source archive from GitHub during setup.

- Source commit: `0dead208310441dd406541d7b98644710d530d0c`
- Source branch: built locally from the scansci-pdf working tree commit above; the wheel in this repository is the shared release artifact
- Source change: legal NJTech ScienceDirect/CARSI diagnostics, manual verification detection, WebVPN session diagnostics, dependency checks, and Elsevier institution selection/cookie banner handling
- Wheel: `scansci_pdf-1.5.0-py3-none-any.whl`
- SHA256: `30256c132b199387bfef08f8ac94c1e3a7e56741ad3ee2e5c3fb474d86aee4d0`

The wheel contains code only. It must not contain accounts, passwords, cookies, tokens, browser profiles, storage state, downloaded PDFs, signed asset URLs, or other private access artifacts.
